mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_topic (user_id, topic_name, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicName}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.topic_name AS topicName, t.sort_order AS sortOrder, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime, IFNULL(n.note_count, 0) AS noteCount FROM biz_topic t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT topic_id, COUNT(1) AS note_count FROM biz_note WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY topic_id ) n ON t.id = n.topic_id
t.user_id = #{userId}
AND t.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.update_time DESC, t.id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE biz_topic SET is_pass = #{isPass}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.topic_name AS topicName, t.sort_order AS sortOrder, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime, IFNULL(n.note_count, 0) AS noteCount FROM biz_topic t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT topic_id, COUNT(1) AS note_count FROM biz_note WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY topic_id ) n ON t.id = n.topic_id
(t.user_id = #{userId} OR t.is_pass = 1)
AND t.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC, t.update_time DESC, t.id DESC
